subject: App crashes on login
body: Every time I try to log in on iOS the app crashes immediately. Reinstalled twice, still happens.
description: iOS app crashes immediately upon login attempt, persists after reinstallation

subject: Add dark mode please
body: Would love a dark mode option, the white background hurts my eyes at night.
description: User requesting dark mode option to reduce eye strain from white background at night

subject: Charged twice this month
body: My card was charged on the 5th and again on the 12th for the same subscription. Need a refund.
description: Customer was double-charged for the same subscription and requests a refund

subject: How do I export my data
body: Looking for a way to export all my notes as a single file. Is this possible?
description: User wants ability to export all notes as a single file

subject: Crashes when I upload images
body: Uploading any image over 2MB causes a crash. This started after the last update.
description: Application crashes when uploading images larger than 2MB after recent update

subject: Pricing question
body: What's the difference between Pro and Team plans? Specifically around seat counts.
description: Customer inquiry about differences between Pro and Team plans regarding seat counts

subject: Love the app
body: Just wanted to say thanks for building this, it's saved me hours every week.
description: Positive user feedback expressing appreciation for the app's time-saving benefits
